name: Alonzo Freeman Awtrey
motto: "Ambition is not a vice of little people."

name: William Tapley Bennett
motto: "How jocund did they drive their team afield! How bowed the woods beneath their sturdy stroke."

name: Robert Lee Ballard
motto: "Heap high the farmer's wintry hoard."

name: Blake Blackshear Bivins
motto: "My tongue within my mouth I reign."

name: William Hugh Boswell
motto: "Thou driftest gently down the tides of sleep."

name: Charles Julian Bloch
motto: "Think not I am what I appear."
clubs: Assistant Manager Glee and Mandolin Club, 1912-13

name: William Jackson Boyett
motto: "Each one to his own trade; then would the cows be well cared for."
clubs: winner of Sophomore and Junior Agricultural Scholarships

name: James Butolph Burch
motto: "His own estimate must be measure enough, His own praise reward enough for him."

name: Simon Turner Brewton
motto: "The sex is ever to a soldier kind."
clubs: Secretary and Treasurer of Die Deutsche Gesellschaft

name: Brantly Callaway, A. B.
motto: "A man, he seems, of cheerful yesterdays and confident tomorrows."

name: Frank Carter, B. S.
motto: "Old politicians chew on wisdom past And totter on in business till the last."
clubs: College Tennis Champion, singles and doubles '10-'11

name: William Edward Campbell, Jr., B. S.
motto: "As full of spirit as the month of may; And gorgeous as the sun in midsummer."

name: Charles Edward Caverly, Jr.
motto: "Who tied thee to that sword?"

name: Hughbert William Conklin
motto: "Plain without pomp, and rich without show."

name: Edward Percival Clark
motto: "Grow old along with me."

name: Zachary Stuart Cowan
clubs: Secretary and President Y. M. C. A.

name: Forrest Cumming
motto: "Night after night, he sat and bleared his eyes with books."

name: Heman Averill Crane
motto: "In the spring a young man's fancy Lightly turns to thoughts of love."

name: Edgar Brown Dunlap
motto: "One who never turned his back, marched breast forward."
clubs: Athletic and Associate Editor Red and Black

name: Edward Lee Floyd
motto: "Comb down his hair; look! look! It stands upright."

name: Mark William Fitzpatrick
motto: "But in his duty prompt at every call."

name: Robert Hill Freeman
motto: "Health and cheerfulness mutually beget each other."
clubs: Critic, Parliamentarian and member Council Phi Kappa

name: Richard Tuggle Goodwyn, Jr.
motto: "A modest, unassuming, harmless youth."
clubs: Member Class Football, Baseball and Basketball teams
Winner of Championship in Singles, Southern Intercollegiate Tennis Association

name: Frank Davis Garrison
motto: "He was a man, take him all in all."

name: Howard Banks Harmon
motto: "As chaste as unsunn'd snow."

name: Robert Powell Howard
motto: "Be ignorance thy choice, where knowledge leads to woe."

name: Henry Grady Howard
motto: "An actor, on my word."

name: Wales Bryan Ingram, B. S.
motto: "No money, no service."

name: James Guyton Johnson, A. B.
motto: "Not one word spoke he more than was need."

name: Ernest Lee Jackson, A. B.
motto: "A mighty spirit fills that little form."

name: Miley Kimball Johnson
motto: "What sweet delight a quiet life affords."

name: Thomas Fred Jones
motto: "The deed I intend is great, But what, as yet, I know not."

name: David White Johnston
motto: "Good at a fight, but better at a play."

name: Henry Grady Kelly
motto: "My heart is ever at your service."

name: Thomas Jackson Lance
motto: "He is divinely bent on meditation."

name: Louis Koplin
motto: "Wilt thou have music? Hark! Apollo plays, And twenty caged nightingales do sing."

name: Julian Gordon Liddell
motto: "I would have you call to mind the strength of the ancient giants."

name: Theodore Sidney Moise, Jr.
motto: "His mother's pride, his father's joy."

name: Jack Watson Lindsay
motto: "Thou who hast the fatal gift of beauty."

name: Edward Morgenstern, A. B.
motto: "Now the bright star, day's harbinger, Comes dancing from the east."

name: Carl Cecil McCrary, B. S.
motto: "A youth to fortune and to fame unknown."

name: Edwin Forrest McCarty, B. S.
motto: "Hail to the chief who in triumph advances."

name: Hiram Ray McLarty
motto: "My own thoughts are my companions."

name: Grady Padgett
motto: "My man's as brave as steel."

name: George Henry Noble
motto: "This man was never known to hurry."

name: Daniel Roscoe Peacock, B. S.
motto: "Never elated while one man's oppressed, Never defeated while another's blessed."
clubs: Ex-officio member of Board of Directors, Athletic Association

name: Raul Estevan Pina, B. S. C. E.
motto: "There is a society in the deepest solitude."

name: Florentino Severo Pina, B. S. C. E.
motto: "Wise from the top of his head up."

name: Elmer Inglesby Ransom
motto: "I am a man, More sinned against than sinning."

name: George Albert Sancken
motto: "He was more than over shoes in love."

name: Julian Lowe Robinson
motto: "A braver soldier never couched a lance, A gentler heart did never sway in court."

name: Benjamin Isaac Segall
motto: 'Much study is a weariness of the flesh.'

name: John Rhodes Slade
motto: 'Thy modesty is a candle to thy merit.'
clubs: Member Glee and Mandolin Club '11-'12-'13 (Leader '12, President '13)

name: William Henry Smith
motto: 'None knew thee but to praise thee'

name: Robert Tate Stevens
motto: "Love and so forth make fools of us, big and little."

name: Samuel Harris Wiley
motto: "It is much easier to be critical than to be correct."

name: Luther Stephens Watson
motto: "Thy merit is warrant for thy welcome."

name: George Livingston Williams
motto: 'O ye who teach the ingenious youth of nations!'

name: Joseph Grady Woodruff
motto: "Blessed be agriculture if one does not have too much of it."

name: Wilbe Radford Wilson
motto: "The man that blushes is not quite a brute."

name: Lloyd Worrall
motto: "A gentleman makes no noise."

name: Gustavus York
motto: "A man is a carnivorous animal and must have meals."

name: Joseph Yampolsky
motto: "A fine volley of words, gentlemen, and quickly shot off."

name: John Law Young
motto: "His sparkling sallies bubbled up as from aerated natural fountains."

name: Marion Hendricks Allen
motto: "Some people are more nice than wise."

name: Mark Waverly Cauble
motto: "My only books were woman's looks, And folly's all they taught me."

name: Aubrey Oliver Bray
motto: "Who are a little wise the best fools be."

name: Patrick Mell Cheney
motto: "He has been partial in the law."

name: Edward Clark
motto: "Whose wit in the combat, as gentle as bright Ne'er carried a heart-stain away on its blade."

name: Dewitt Talmadge Deen
motto: "He's a justice of peace in his country."

name: Robert DeWitt Duke
motto: "Far different he from the dull, plodding tribe."

name: Samuel Kenney Dick
motto: "Costly thy habit as thy purse can buy."

name: James Montgomery Lynch, B. L.
motto: "For a woman is only a woman, But a good cigar is a smoke."
clubs: Social Editor, Associate Editor, Editor-in-Chief Red and Black
Delegate S. C. P. A. convention 1912

name: William Azmer Mann, A. B., B. L.
motto: "Before we proceed any further hear me speak."

name: Lewis Archibald Mills, Jr., B. L.
motto: "The trumpet of his own virtues."

name: John Brazie Morris
motto: "This was the noblest Roman of them all."

name: Charles Henderson Newsom
motto: "Common sense to an uncommon degree is what the world calls wisdom."

name: Donald Theodore MacKinnon
motto: "Wit does not take the place of knowledge."

name: Robert Marion Nicholson
motto: "In each cheek appears a pretty dimple— Love made these hollows."

name: Henry Levy Rogers
motto: "Angels are painted fair to look like you."

name: Robert Sheldon Raiford
motto: "'Cause I's wicked—I is, I's mighty wicked anyhow. I can't help it."

name: David Augustine Russell
motto: "Age cannot wither him, nor custom stale His infinite variety."

name: Parke Skelton
motto: "He who fights and runs away, Will live to fight another day."

name: Frank Muir Scarlett
motto: "Lord, Lord, how this world is given to lying."

name: Delcer Solomon Strickland, B. L.
motto: "He hath a lean and hungry look."

name: Olaf Johann Tolnas, A. B., B. L.
motto: "Too exact, and studious of similitude rather than beauty."

name: William Milton Thomas, A. B., B. L.
motto: "He trudged along, unknowing what he sought, And whistled as he went, for want of thought."

name: Roy William Wallace
motto: "Be merry if you are wise."

name: Robert Emmett Butterly
motto: "A man who pours drugs of which he knows little, into a body of which he knows less."

name: Henry Grady Parrish
motto: "Learned he was in medical lore."

name: Addison Lloyd Norman
motto: "So lived our sires ere doctors learned to kill And multiplied with theirs the weekly bill."

name: M. Riviera
motto: "By strangers honor'd, and by strangers mourn'd."

name: Winter, Alphonse Anderson

name: Vaughn, Clarence Rowland
motto: ,name:

name: Bowden, David Timon
motto: ,name:
